TC-HKP-07: change toolRegistry after sync, call syncToolsToBridge() again, verify getToolSchemas() reflects new state

test_execution.evidence: TC-HKP-06: expect(schemas).toHaveLength(2), expect(schemas[0].name).toBe('hello'). TC-HKP-07: after registry change, expect(schemas).toHaveLength(3). bridge-sync.test.ts: 2 tests pass.

execute_steps: cd src-electron/runtime && npx vitest run test/plugin-hooks-integration.test.ts --reporter=verbose
TC-HKP-08: register tool 'p1:hello' (schema.name='hello') in toolRegistry, call handleBridgeToolExecute({toolName:'hello'}), verify result.isError=false
TC-HKP-09: call handleBridgeToolExecute({toolName:'nonexistent'}), verify result.isError=true, result.content contains 'Tool not found'
TC-HKP-10: empty toolRegistry, call handleBridgeToolExecute, verify error response
test_execution.evidence: TC-HKP-08: expect(result.isError).toBe(false), expect(result.content).toBeDefined(). TC-HKP-09: expect(result.isError).toBe(true), content matches /Tool not found/. TC-HKP-10: expect(result.isError).toBe(true).

execute_steps: code_review: read resources/pi/agent/extensions/bridge/index.ts lines 15-42
verify state machine: state starts as 'Disconnected', sync() sets to 'Syncing', on success sets to 'Ready'
verify retry: catch block in sync() calls setTimeout(sync, 2000) for reconnect, retryCount increments, max 30 retries
verify onDisconnect: api.on('disconnect', () => { state = 'Disconnected'; sync() }) triggers reconnect
test_execution.evidence: bridge/index.ts: state machine implemented with 3 states (Disconnected/Syncing/Ready). sync() at line 23 uses try/catch with retry on failure. onDisconnect at line 40 resets state and calls sync(). No automated e2e test (requires live pi process). Verified by code review + BLR v5 pass.

verify check() always returns true for trusted plugins regardless of granted permissions
test_execution.evidence: plugin-permission.test.ts: expect(checker.check('trusted-plugin', 'tool_register')).toBe(true) without any grant(). expect(checker.check('trusted-plugin', 'any_method')).toBe(true).

execute_steps: cd src-electron/runtime && npx tsx --test test/plugin-sandbox.test.ts
verify BLOCKED_MODULES list includes 'fs', 'child_process', 'net', 'os'
verify resolveFilename hook throws Error when module is in BLOCKED_MODULES
verify resolveFilename allows safe modules (relative paths within pluginDir)
test_execution.evidence: plugin-sandbox.test.ts: expect(BLOCKED_MODULES).toContain('fs'). expect(() => resolve('fs')).toThrow(). expect(() => resolve('./safe')).not.toThrow(). 8 tests pass.

verify storage.delete() removes value
test_execution.evidence: plugin-storage.test.ts: expect(storage.get('missing')).toBeUndefined(). expect(storage.get('key')).toBe('value') after set(). 7 tests pass.

test_execution.evidence: TC-DEP-03: expect(result.map(d=>d.id)).toEqual(['B','A']). TC-DEP-04: expect(result.map(d=>d.id)).toEqual(['db','auth','api']). Kahn's algorithm verified. 6 tests pass.
